page.heroSubtitle: The app calculates travel times and warns you if the 8pm restaurant is 2 hours from the 6pm museum. Zero surprises on the ground.

faqItems.question: How do I create a day-by-day travel itinerary?
faqItems.answer: With Weplanify, simply add your stops (accommodations, activities, restaurants) and they automatically appear on the timeline. You can then reorganize with drag-and-drop.

faqItems.question: Does the app calculate travel times?
faqItems.answer: Yes, Weplanify automatically calculates travel times between each stop on your itinerary, whether by car, public transit, or on foot.

faqItems.question: Can I export the itinerary to PDF?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely! Export your complete itinerary to PDF to have it offline or print it out.

faqItems.question: How do I reorganize activities in the itinerary?
faqItems.answer: Just use drag-and-drop! Move any activity to another day or change the order within the same day.

faqItems.question: Is the itinerary shared with the whole group?
faqItems.answer: Yes, all trip participants see the same itinerary in real time.

page.ctaTitle: Say goodbye to messy Excel spreadsheets
page.ctaSubtitle: Drag and drop, the app optimizes your routes
page.seoDescription: Organize your trip day by day with our interactive timeline. Visualize, reorganize, and optimize your vacation schedule easily.
